CVE-2022-38465.title: Authentication Bypass in Web Server
CVE-2022-38465.description: The integrated web server of affected devices allow unauthenticated remote attackers to bypass authentication and gain full administrative access
CVE-2022-38465.recommendation: Update firmware to V4.5.0 or later immediately

CVE-2021-44691.title: Denial of Service via Malformed Packets
CVE-2021-44691.description: Affected devices do not properly validate incoming network packets, allowing remote attackers to cause denial of service
CVE-2021-44691.recommendation: Update to V4.4.0 or later, implement network filtering

CVE-2020-15782.title: Memory Corruption Vulnerability
CVE-2020-15782.description: A memory corruption vulnerability allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code or cause system crash
CVE-2020-15782.recommendation: Urgently update firmware to V3.3.17 or later

CVE-2019-13945.title: Unencrypted Communication
CVE-2019-13945.description: Devices use unencrypted S7 protocol allowing traffic interception and manipulation
CVE-2019-13945.recommendation: Update firmware and enable S7-PLUS encrypted communication where possible

CVE-2018-4832.title: Information Disclosure via SNMP
CVE-2018-4832.description: SNMP service exposes device information including firmware version and configuration details
CVE-2018-4832.workaround: Disable SNMP service if not required
CVE-2018-4832.recommendation: Disable SNMP or restrict access to trusted management networks only
